title: MacIdeas v.1.3 November Update!
description: In this first feature drop update after the MacIdeas version 1.0 update, we're not only releasing a bunch of new exciting content and features that boost your productivity, but also improving and fixing a lot of stuff, along with a new update schedule! Let's see what's new with this big update:

mainarticles.p1: Back in the July update, we introduced the new Create List feature for Lists that allows you to create new lists and check/manage multiple lists at the same time, instead of only limiting to one list. We're very excited to announce that we're releasing this feature to MacIdeas Tasks, too! Now, you can create multiple task lists each with different tasks, and view/manage them individually! You can also rename or delete task lists. With this powerful new feature, you're no longer limited to one task list, but you can create multiple task lists each for a different job and switch between them seamlessly! Now, your productivity's only limitations is you 🔥!
mainarticles.p2: Other than allowing you to create different task lists, we also rewrote the code logic behind Tasks so it's more performance optimized, faster speeds, and more user friendly! We also added a new welcome landing page for tasks and fixed a couple bugs with Tasks. Now, you can manage your tasks easier and faster than ever before ✅!
mainarticles.p3: Before this update, you could only change the font size of your note, which didn't do much. But now, we're turning MacIdeas Notes into a rich text editor that can format, organize, and create unique text. In this update, we're adding four new feautures: Bold, Italic, Underline, and Strikthrough to MacIdeas Notes! Simply select the text in the note you want to format, then choose which formatting option you want, then click on the button, then you're done! This makes Notes so much more helpful because you can easily see important text or sentences thanks to formatting! We're planning on adding more options like highliting and making lists to make Notes ever more powerful in the future 📝!
mainarticles.p4: We tweaked with the overall style for a little bit to make sure that your experience on MacIdeas is intuitive and appealing to use. We added a small title for each button and feature that explains what it does when you hover over it so you'll never get stuck not knowing what a button is for. We also added some quality of life changes like pressing the enter key to finish editing a task.
mainarticles.p5: Just like the new update schedule we're applying to other MacWeb apps, MacIdeas is also getting a new update schedule. From this update forward, MacIdeas is going to get an update every 3 months. This means we'll release a new update for MacIdeas each quarter of the year. Specifically, February, May, August, and November. Each update will be named after the season (Spring Update, Fall Update, etc). We made this change so the schedule is more consitent and regular and we have more time to develop exciting new features 📅!
